summary: Fintech startup on a project engagement (brand identity); casual, fast-moving voice
name: Lumio
voice: Casual, direct, fast-moving. First-person plural, lowercase energy, no corporate hedging. Emoji okay in chat, not in deliverables.

summary: Conservation nonprofit on a project engagement (annual report); mission-driven, plainspoken voice
name: Riverkeep
voice: Mission-driven, plainspoken, hopeful. Active voice, concrete over abstract, donors named as partners. Earnest, never preachy; specifics over adjectives.

summary: Enterprise retail brand on a retainer; formal, brand-guideline-bound voice with sign-off chains
name: Brightmore Group
voice: Formal, polished, brand-guideline-bound. Third-person brand voice, Oxford comma, no contractions in headlines. Every public asset clears brand + legal.
